deterministic_evidence.scope: Astro and Starlight security patch, Router Core, MCP bundle, release artifacts, documentation, site smoke, and visual contracts

behavior_evidence.basis: The frozen source changes the documentation-site dependency graph, release version surfaces, generated release metadata, documentation, and one named cross-host visual-test tolerance only. Router Core routing logic, MCP tool semantics, persisted schema, and evaluation scoring are unchanged; the reviewed V2.0.0 behavior evidence therefore remains the bounded reference rather than being relabeled as a new run.

known_limitations: This security patch does not establish a new real-model behavior qualification and does not claim an additional routing-quality result.
Real Skill activation, token reduction, and task outcome remain unobservable in the inherited routing-contract evidence.
The Plugin's separate, documented MCP SDK transitive dependency exception remains outside the site dependency tree fixed by this patch.

release_decision.basis: The frozen source has passed the deterministic release gates, the site lockfile audit reports zero vulnerabilities, and the patch does not modify Router behavior.
